panels.title: Query History Count
panels.description: Total number of queries inserted into query history

panels.title: Query History Search Duration
panels.description: Search duration percentiles for query history lookups (p50, p95, p99)

panels.title: Query History Exports
panels.description: Total number of query history exports performed

panels.title: Query History Retention Cleanup
panels.description: Rate of query history entries deleted by retention policy

panels.title: Query History Table Size
panels.description: Current size of the query history table in bytes

panels.title: Query Duration Distribution (Completed from History)
panels.description: Duration distribution of completed queries recorded in query history (p50, p95, p99)

panels.title: Plan Checks Total
panels.description: Total number of plan check operations performed

panels.title: Plan Check Duration
panels.description: Duration percentiles for plan check operations (p50, p95, p99)

panels.title: Issues by Category
panels.description: Rate of plan check issues detected, grouped by category

panels.title: Running vs Queued Queries
panels.description: Running and queued queries per resource group

panels.title: Executed Queries Rate
panels.description: Rate of executed queries per resource group

panels.title: Queue Wait Duration Rate
panels.description: Rate of queue wait duration per resource group

panels.title: CPU Usage by Resource Group
panels.description: CPU usage percentage per resource group and host

panels.title: Memory Usage by Resource Group
panels.description: Memory usage and available bytes per resource group and host

panels.title: Memory Quota & Shared Usage
panels.description: Memory quota used and shared memory used per resource group and host

panels.title: I/O Throughput
panels.description: Read and write bytes per second per resource group, host, and tablespace

panels.title: I/O Operations
panels.description: Read and write operations per second per resource group, host, and tablespace

panels.title: Queries Rate by State
panels.description: Rate of observed queries by database, user, and state

panels.title: Slow Queries Rate
panels.description: Rate of slow queries by database and user

panels.title: Canceled Queries Rate
panels.description: Rate of canceled queries by reason

panels.title: Spill Files per Segment
panels.description: Spill file size in bytes per segment

panels.title: Spill Files per Query
panels.description: Spill file size in bytes per query

panels.title: Table Skew Coefficient
panels.description: Data distribution skew coefficient per table

panels.title: Query Exporter Up
panels.description: Whether the query exporter database connection is healthy

panels.title: Exporter Scrape Duration
panels.description: Duration percentiles of database metric scrape (p50, p95, p99)

panels.title: Total Connections
panels.description: Total number of database connections

panels.title: Backends & Connections
panels.description: Active backends, connection count, and max connections

panels.title: Tuples Returned & Temp Files
panels.description: Tuples returned rate and temp files per database

panels.title: Replication Lag (write/flush/replay)
panels.description: Replication lag in bytes for write, flush, and replay stages

panels.title: Table Scan Tuples (seq read / idx fetch)
panels.description: Sequential tuples read and index tuples fetched per table
